subcodes.first_line: the servant in attendance read thy letter before the Wronged One and, attaining unto its hearing, was enraptured by its words and phrases [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عبد حاضر کتابت را نزد مظلوم قرائت نمود و باصغا فائز گشت و از کلمات و عباراتش
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
